projectDescription: A tiny TypeScript library for building type-safe, variant-driven CSS class name components.
keyFeatures: Type-safe variant definitions with full TypeScript inference
Compound variants for applying classes based on multiple variant combinations
Default variants to set fallback values
Framework-agnostic — works with React, Vue, Svelte, Astro, and more
Built-in cx utility (alias of clsx) for class concatenation
compose API to merge multiple cva components
defineConfig hook for customizing class output (e.g. tailwind-merge integration)
publicApiSurface: cva(config) — creates a variant component function
defineConfig(options) — creates a custom cva/cx/compose instance with hooks
VariantProps<Component> — utility type to extract variant prop types
ClassValue — union type for valid class name values
CX / CXOptions / CXReturn — cx function types
CVA / DefineConfig / Compose — interface types for library functions
